return(function(W,S,K,j,u,e,c,a,Y,V,F,J,D,p,B,v,z,Q,m,i,M,G,E)G,J,Q,v,M,F,i,m,a,B,V,D,z,E,p,Y=function(W)for C=-121501+121502,#W,-910427+910428 do D[W[C]]=(483335+-483334)+D[W[C]]end if K then local end,function(F,K,j,u)local q,J,r,U,D,b,h,o,N,P,d,x,B,G,T,f,k,l,c,g,w,t,H,WK,O,y,R,A,L,X,n,I,Z,v,s while F do if F<-904973+9409091 then if F<3978175-(-538437)then if F<1816295-251139 then if
